raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 150 will embed workforce and community benefit incentives into state and federal infrastructure programs.",
    "The federal Infrastructure and Investment Jobs Act, the Inflation Reduction Act, and the CHIPS and Science Act will collectively invest approximately $752 billion into roads, bridges, and rail systems.",
    "SB 150 prioritizes equitable hiring for Black workers and other workers of color from marginalized communities.",
    "California aims to build climate-ready and robust infrastructure to protect and prepare communities for the future.",
    "SB 150 ensures equitable access to career opportunities and good-paying jobs in the green economy.",
    "The Bureau of Labor Statistics recently reported that nearly 90 percent of unemployed individuals in the U.S. are Black Americans, with similar disparities reflected in California.",
    "SB 150 provides opportunities for equity in access to high-paying construction and manufacturing jobs.",
    "SB 150 will help workers and communities build real partnerships with Clean Tech companies to create high-quality, middle-class careers within the green economy."
  ]
}
```
